name: listing-1
title: Modern Listing 1
description: A clean and modern listing design

files.content:
import { Star, ArrowRight } from 'lucide-react' import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button' import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge' import { Card, CardContent, CardFooter, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card' import { cn } from '@/lib/utils' interface Service { id: number title: string price: number duration: string rating: number image: string category: string description: string } const services: Service[] = [ { id: 1, title: 'Web Development', price: 2999, duration: '2-4 weeks', rating: 4.9, image: 'https://assets.shadcnstore.com/shadcnstore.com/stock/marketing/fashion-template-preview.500w.76ef52.avif', category: 'Development', description: 'Professional development services tailored to your business needs. Scalable solutions that drive results.', }, { id: 2, title: 'Mobile App Development', price: 4999, duration: '4-8 weeks', rating: 4.8, image: 'https://assets.shadcnstore.com/shadcnstore.com/stock/marketing/customer-testimonial-video-thumbnail.600w.9b1f27.avif', category: 'Development', description: 'Native mobile applications for both iOS and Android platforms. Built with the latest technologies for optimal performance.', }, { id: 3, title: 'UI/UX Design', price: 1999, duration: '2-3 weeks', rating: 4.7, image: 'https://assets.shadcnstore.com/shadcnstore.com/stock/marketing/uiux-design.500w.b4c8f3.avif', category: 'Design', description: 'Transform your brand with our creative design solutions. Visually stunning interfaces that captivate your audience.', }, { id: 4, title: 'Digital Marketing', price: 1499, duration: 'Ongoing', rating: 4.6, image: 'https://assets.shadcnstore.com/shadcnstore.com/stock/marketing/digital-marketing.500w.241875.avif', category: 'Marketing', description: 'Boost your online presence with our digital marketing strategies. Reach and engage your target audience effectively.', }, { id: 5, title: 'Brand Identity', price: 1299, duration: '3-4 weeks', rating: 4.8, image: 'https://assets.shadcnstore.com/shadcnstore.com/stock/marketing/brand-identity.500w.df8c41.avif', category: 'Design', description: 'Create a strong brand identity with our design expertise. Consistent branding across all platforms and materials.', }, { id: 6, title: 'Cloud Solutions', price: 3999, duration: '4-6 weeks', rating: 4.9, image: 'https://assets.shadcnstore.com/shadcnstore.com/stock/marketing/cloud-solutions.500w.b0daeb.avif', category: 'IT Services', description: 'Reliable IT solutions to keep your business running smoothly. Expert support and innovative technology services.', }, ] interface Listing1Props { className?: string } export default function Listing1({ className }: Listing1Props) { return (

Our Professional Services

Expert solutions tailored to your business needs

{services.map(service => (
{service.category}
{service.rating}
{service.title}

{service.description}
${service.price} / project
{service.duration}
))}
) }
